creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
Created attachment 149731
Include the posttls-finger program and its manpage

The install process uses the upstream installer, which does not install posttls-finger or its manpage.  It's a handy little tool if you want to do certificate-based authentication, so we should include it for convenience.  The attached patch tacks it onto postfix-files so the installer grabs it.
